title: Miami Heat Wave
lead: Miami is experiencing a severe heat wave with a Z-Score of +3.63. This extreme weather event has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Miami has resulted in extremely high temperatures, with a Cooling Degree Days (CDD) value of 11.7 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 68%, and the wind speed is approximately 19.8 km/h, offering little relief from the heat. 
 The lack of Heating Degree Days (HDD) at 0.0 GG further emphasizes the intense heat, making outdoor activities challenging.
conclusion: Implement immediate measures to mitigate the effects of the heat wave.
